user.title: GivEnergy Local
user.description: Connect to your GivEnergy inverter via local Modbus TCP.

data.passive: Passive mode (listen only — another client drives refreshes)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure GivEnergy Local
reconfigure.description: Update the connection or refresh settings for this inverter. The integration reloads automatically when you save.

data.passive: Passive mode (listen only — another client drives refreshes)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the inverter. Check the IP address and port.
error.wrong_inverter: The inverter at that address has a different serial number from the one originally configured. Remove and re-add the integration if you want to switch inverters.

init.title: Regenerate GivEnergy dashboard
init.description:
Your GivEnergy dashboard was generated with schema v{old_version}. Schema v{new_version} is now available with layout improvements.

Clicking Fix will regenerate the dashboard and save the updated YAML to `/local/`. A notification will appear with a download link when it is ready.

Your current settings (power chart envelope, etc.) will be preserved.

capture_frames.name: Capture debug frames
capture_frames.description: Records raw Modbus wire frames from the inverter for a set duration and saves them as a redacted text file in /local/.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The GivEnergy inverter to capture from. If omitted, the first connected inverter is used.

duration.name: Duration (seconds)
duration.description: How long to capture frames for. Defaults to 60 seconds.
